title: Retirement Record
description: Record tracking the sunsetting and archival of an agent at the end of its lifecycle

agent_id.description: Identifier of the agent being retired

timestamp.description: ISO8601 timestamp of the retirement event execution

reason.description: Reason for retirement (e.g. replaced, deprecated, unmaintained)

successor_agent_id.description: Optional identifier of the agent taking over routing responsibilities

approver.description: Identity of the system or human that approved the retirement
